commands.summary: regenerates plan cursor after CP00-112 evidence creation

claude_review_command: claude -p --model claude-opus-4-8 --effort max --permission-mode dontAsk --tools "" --output-format json < staged diff prompt > /tmp/cp00-112-claude-review-output-valid.json
notes: No real client, matter, document, billing, settlement, credential, or secret data was used; CP00-112 uses synthetic identifiers, static terminal profile references, and metadata-only API fixtures only.

CP00-112 implements a Risk C RP02 Permission Kernel interface closeout catalog and API scaffold; it does not mutate permission policy, write audit ledger entries, create database rows, write product state, persist idempotency keys, acquire locks, execute rollback/retry, execute AI retrieval, execute export downloads, perform external sharing, execute Claude review by fixture, grant human approval by fixture, or implement LDIP.

Claude reported no P0/P1/P2 findings and 1 P3 finding. The P3 taxonomy exercise note is documented as non-blocking because CP00-112 is api_interface_scaffold_only and declares forward-looking permission_denied and unauthorized_data_omitted taxonomy entries for the CP00-113 Risk A API permission/audit binding continuation. No second valid review was run.
